questions.question: What is the concept of natural capital as a stock option?
questions.expected_document_title: Natural Capital as a Stock Option
questions.expected_answer_excerpt: The concept involves treating natural capital, which includes Earth's ecosystems and their services, as a financial asset similar to a stock option. This approach suggests that by assigning market value to ecosystem restoration and maintenance, it can be integrated into economic activities, potentially leading to sustainable practices that align financial success with environmental health.

questions.question: Why do singularities form in viscosity solutions of HJB equations?
questions.expected_document_title:
On classical solutions and canonical transformations for
  Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman equations
questions.expected_answer_excerpt: Singularities in viscosity solutions of HJB equations typically form due to the non-uniqueness of optimal trajectories in the associated variational problem. Even if the initial data is smooth, these singularities can develop over time when certain conditions on convexity or continuity fail.
questions.source_chunk_content: Singularities in viscosity solutions of HJB equations typically form due to the non-uniqueness of optimal trajectories in the associated variational problem. Even if the initial data is smooth, these singularities can develop over time when certain conditions on convexity or continuity fail.
